compiled_state.title: test_ticket_llm_format.py had contradictory RED tests that could never pass simultaneously
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: test_parent_id_always_emitted asserted parent_id is always emitted (even when None), while test_ticket_list_llm_format_shortened_keys asserted no null values in LLM output. These are contradictory — parent_id=None cannot be both emitted and omitted. Fixed in a5c450d7 by aligning with existing behavior (None values are omitted). The RED test was a spec test that was never GREEN and contradicted the integration test.
